metadata.title: Folder Focus Mode
metadata.description: Focus file explorer on chosen folder and its files and subdirectories, while hiding all the other elements.

regex.source: .setName("Show focus option on file context menu")
regex.target: .setName("在文件上下文菜单中显示聚焦选项")

regex.source: .setDesc("Ensures the plugin focuses automatically on directory of newly opened files, if they are not visible right now")
regex.target: .setDesc("确保插件在新打开的文件的目录当前不可见时，自动聚焦到该目录。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Focus on the first folder from root if the auto focus setting is enabled")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果启用了自动聚焦设置，则聚焦到根目录下的第一个文件夹。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Always auto-focus on the parent directory of current file, even if it is already visible")
regex.target: .setDesc("即使当前文件的父目录已经可见，也始终自动聚焦到当前文件的父目录。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Hide parent directories when focusing on a folder (saves space when using nested folders)")
regex.target: .setDesc("聚焦文件夹时隐藏父目录（在使用嵌套文件夹时节省空间）。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Add a button on the top of the file explorer")
regex.target: .setDesc("在文件资源管理器顶部添加一个按钮。")

regex.source: .setDesc('Show "Focus on this file" option in file context menu')
regex.target: .setDesc("在文件上下文菜单中显示“聚焦于此文件”选项。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Focus on the folder linked with the folder note")
regex.target: .setDesc("聚焦于文件夹笔记所链接的文件夹。")
